message:
chore(snapshots): regenerate 216 test snapshots after correctness and theme fixes

Bulk snapshot update reflecting the combined source changes:
- Layout algorithm fixes (topological sort, ratio distribution, grid clamping)
- Theme color adjustments (Doom/Quake accent_error, accent_success)
- Deterministic VoI overlay timing
- New snapshots for drag-drop and quake easter egg screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
